eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Kit Carson, CO; at 03:52 PM ON APR 22, 2026 Effective until 05:52 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Kit Carson Sheriff immediate evacuation due to fast moving wildfire. Leave now if you are west Flagler between County Road 1 and east to County Road 4. Between I70 north to Road AA. Go to Wheatland Conference Center at 14 East 2nd Street. Updates at https://www.facebook.com/KCCCommunications  Or updates Facebook KCC Communications Center
